ddls:
CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the economic indicator */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the economic indicator */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating of the economic indicator */,
  "trend" TEXT /* Trend of the economic indicator */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the economic indicator value applies to */,
  "indicator_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the indicator */,
  "indicator_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the indicator */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the indicator data was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the indicator is currently active or deprecated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_rating FOREIGN KEY ("rating") REFERENCES indicator_ratings ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_trend FOREIGN KEY ("trend") REFERENCES trends ("trend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the country belongs to */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the country */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language of the country */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the country data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicator_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "rating_name" TEXT /* Name of the rating */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the rating */,
  "rating_scale" TEXT /* Scale used for the rating */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the rating was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend */,
  "trend_name" TEXT /* Name of the trend */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trend */,
  "trend_direction" TEXT /* Direction of the trend */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the trend was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_contributions" (
  "contribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data contribution */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country contributing the data */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic indicator */,
  "contribution_date" TEXT /* Date the data was contributed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the contribution (e.g., submitted, verified) */,
  "contribution_source" TEXT /* Source of the data contribution */,
  "contribution_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the data contribution */,
  "verified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who verified the data */,
  "verification_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was verified */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the contribution record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_contributions_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_contributions_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES economic_indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_contributions_verified_by FOREIGN KEY ("verified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, policymaker, public) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the user's record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic indicator being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the indicator */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the indicator was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES economic_indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
